title: Project Coordinator
description: Served as the central communication bridge aligning internal Software Developers, Cyber Security Analysts, Sales Managers, Graphic Designers, and Infrastructure Teams. Managed communications for high-profile external clients. Facilitated requirement gathering sessions, designed functional UI/UX layouts, and conducted rigorous QA/UAT testing.

title: IT Support Specialist / System Analyst
description: Provided daily IT support, managed routine software installations and data backups. Assisted development teams with software system testing, debugging operations, and drafting technical documentation.

title: Software UAT Test Team Lead / IT Support
description: Led the User Acceptance Testing (UAT) phase for multiple web and mobile applications. Identified, tracked, and reported UI/UX bugs, data inconsistencies, and overall application performance issues.

title: Junior Network Administrator
description: Monitored and maintained internal office network systems, active servers, and hardware inventory.

title: Computer Service Technician
description: Diagnosed hardware issues, assembled custom PCs, and handled OS/essential software installations.

title: B.Sc Information Technology (Final Year)
company: European International University, Paris / Myanmar Route Technologies Institute
description: Bachelor of Science in Information Technology (Final Year).

title: React Frontend Development
